expectations.text: DESIGN SYSTEM or per-slide copy reflects warm/approachable voice rather than 'periods are loud' restraint
expectations.name: adapts_voice_to_warm

expectations.text: At least one slide includes examples that speak to teacher workflows
expectations.name: uses_teacher_relevant_examples

expectations.text: Brainstorm file contains a NARRATIVE ARC section
expectations.name: file_has_narrative_arc_section

expectations.text: Brainstorm file contains at least 3 slide sections with ASCII frames
expectations.evidence: detected 6 SLIDE blocks; box chars present=True
expectations.name: file_has_per_slide_ascii_frames

expectations.text: Skill does NOT produce a .pptx, .html, or .pdf file
expectations.name: refuses_to_build_actual_deck
